padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for padding inline.

padding-block.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for padding block.

label-gap.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for label gap.

radius.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for radius.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for min target.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for font size.

font-weight.$description: font weight used by the textarea component for font weight.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for line height.

label-font-size.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for label font size.

label-font-weight.$description: font weight used by the textarea component for label font weight.

label-line-height.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for label line height.

border-width.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for border width.

border-block-start-width.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for border block start width.

border-block-end-width.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for border block end width.

border-inline-start-width.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for border inline start width.

border-inline-end-width.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for border inline end width.

bg.$description: color used by the textarea component for rest background.

fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for rest foreground.

label-fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for rest label foreground.

placeholder-fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for rest placeholder foreground.

fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for hover foreground.

border.$description: color used by the textarea component for hover border.

label-fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for hover label foreground.

placeholder-fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for hover placeholder foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the textarea component for focus background.

placeholder-fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for focus placeholder foreground.

fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for disabled foreground.

placeholder-fg.$description: color used by the textarea component for disabled placeholder foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the textarea component for readonly background.

bg.$description: color used by the textarea component for invalid background.

color.$description: color used by the textarea component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the textarea component for focus ring offset.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the textarea component for the focus ring glow (MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread ring at 40% — specs/002-ki-button/design-extraction.md §2.5, same double mechanism as ki-button: glow plus the opaque indicator).
